---
title: "La Trobe Sport Analytics"
subtitle: "Masters of Sport Analytics | La Trobe University"
page-layout: full
---

## Welcome

This site hosts tutorials and resources from the **Masters of Sport Analytics** program at La Trobe University. Each tutorial walks through a real-world sport analytics problem using R, covering data access, wrangling, visualisation, and modelling.

Browse the [Tutorials](tutorials/index.qmd) to get started.

## What You Will Find Here

- Step-by-step coding tutorials using real sport data
- Interactive visualisations and animations
- Techniques used by professional sport analysts
- Resources spanning multiple sports and analytical methods

## About the Program

The Masters of Sport Analytics at La Trobe University prepares graduates for careers in professional sport, combining statistical modelling, data science, and domain expertise in sport performance.
